flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at CUNY Bronx Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.8k vs 7.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY Bronx Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).
